---
description: 'System table containing information about parts and columns of MergeTree
  tables.'

slug: /operations/system-tables/parts_columns
title: 'system.parts_columns'
doc_type: 'reference'
---

## Description {#description}

Contains information about parts and columns of [MergeTree](../../engines/table-engines/mergetree-family/mergetree.md) tables.
Each row describes one data part.

## Columns {#columns}

<!--AUTOGENERATED_START-->
- `partition` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) ‚Äî The partition name.
- `name` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) ‚Äî Name of the data part.
- `uuid` ([UUID](/sql-reference/data-types/uuid)) ‚Äî The parts UUID.
- `part_type` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) ‚Äî The data part storing format. Possible values: Wide ‚Äî Each column is stored in a separate file in a filesystem, Compact ‚Äî All columns are stored in one file in a filesystem.
- `active` ([UInt8](/sql-reference/data-types/int-uint)) ‚Äî Flag that indicates whether the data part is active. If a data part is active, it's used in a table. Otherwise, it's deleted. Inactive data parts remain after merging.
- `marks` ([UInt64](/sql-reference/data-types/int-uint)) ‚Äî The number of marks. To get the approximate number of rows in a data part, multiply marks by the index granularity (usually 8192) (this hint does not work for adaptive granularity).
- `rows` ([UInt64](/sql-reference/data-types/int-uint)) ‚Äî The number of rows.
- `bytes_on_disk` ([UInt64](/sql-reference/data-types/int-uint)) ‚Äî Total size of all the data part files in bytes.
- `data_compressed_bytes` ([UInt64](/sql-reference/data-types/int-uint)) ‚Äî Total size of compressed data in the data part. All the auxiliary files (for example, files with marks) are not included.
- `data_uncompressed_bytes` ([UInt64](/sql-reference/data-types/int-uint)) ‚Äî Total size of uncompressed data in the data part. All the auxiliary files (for example, files with marks) are not included.
- `marks_bytes` ([UInt64](/sql-reference/data-types/int-uint)) ‚Äî The size of the file with marks.
- `modification_time` ([DateTime](/sql-reference/data-types/datetime)) ‚Äî The time the directory with the data part was modified. This usually corresponds to the time of data part creation.
- `remove_time` ([DateTime](/sql-reference/data-types/datetime)) ‚Äî The time when the data part became inactive.
- `refcount` ([UInt32](/sql-reference/data-types/int-uint)) ‚Äî The number of places where the data part is used. A value greater than 2 indicates that the data part is used in queries or merges.
- `min_date` ([Date](/sql-reference/data-types/date)) ‚Äî The minimum value for the Date column if that is included in the partition key.
- `max_date` ([Date](/sql-reference/data-types/date)) ‚Äî The maximum value for the Date column if that is included in the partition key.
- `min_time` ([DateTime](/sql-reference/data-types/datetime)) ‚Äî The minimum value for the DateTime column if that is included in the partition key.
- `max_time` ([DateTime](/sql-reference/data-types/datetime)) ‚Äî The maximum value for the DateTime column if that is included in the partition key.
- `partition_id` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) ‚Äî ID of the partition.
- `min_block_number` ([Int64](/sql-reference/data-types/int-uint)) ‚Äî The minimum number of data parts that make up the current part after merging.
- `max_block_number` ([Int64](/sql-reference/data-types/int-uint)) ‚Äî The maximum number of data parts that make up the current part after merging.
- `level` ([UInt32](/sql-reference/data-types/int-uint)) ‚Äî Depth of the merge tree. Zero means that the current part was created by insert rather than by merging other parts.
- `data_version` ([UInt64](/sql-reference/data-types/int-uint)) ‚Äî Number that is used to determine which mutations should be applied to the data part (mutations with a version higher than data_version).
- `primary_key_bytes_in_memory` ([UInt64](/sql-reference/data-types/int-uint)) ‚Äî The amount of memory (in bytes) used by primary key values.
- `primary_key_bytes_in_memory_allocated` ([UInt64](/sql-reference/data-types/int-uint)) ‚Äî The amount of memory (in bytes) reserved for primary key values.
- `database` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) ‚Äî Name of the database.
- `table` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) ‚Äî Name of the table.
- `engine` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) ‚Äî Name of the table engine without parameters.
- `disk_name` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) ‚Äî Name of a disk that stores the data part.
- `path` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) ‚Äî Absolute path to the folder with data part files.
- `column` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) ‚Äî Name of the column.
- `type` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) ‚Äî Column type.
- `column_position` ([UInt64](/sql-reference/data-types/int-uint)) ‚Äî Ordinal position of a column in a table starting with 1.
- `default_kind` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) ‚Äî Expression type (DEFAULT, MATERIALIZED, ALIAS) for the default value, or an empty string if it is not defined.
- `default_expression` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) ‚Äî Expression for the default value, or an empty string if it is not defined.
- `column_bytes_on_disk` ([UInt64](/sql-reference/data-types/int-uint)) ‚Äî Total size of the column in bytes.
- `column_data_compressed_bytes` ([UInt64](/sql-reference/data-types/int-uint)) ‚Äî Total size of the compressed data in the column, in bytes.
- `column_data_uncompressed_bytes` ([UInt64](/sql-reference/data-types/int-uint)) ‚Äî Total size of the decompressed data in the column, in bytes.
- `column_marks_bytes` ([UInt64](/sql-reference/data-types/int-uint)) ‚Äî The size of the marks for column, in bytes.
- `column_modification_time` ([Nullable(DateTime)](/sql-reference/data-types/nullable)) ‚Äî The last time the column was modified.
- `column_ttl_min` ([Nullable(DateTime)](/sql-reference/data-types/nullable)) ‚Äî The minimum value of the calculated TTL expression of the column.
- `column_ttl_max` ([Nullable(DateTime)](/sql-reference/data-types/nullable)) ‚Äî The maximum value of the calculated TTL expression of the column.
- `statistics` ([Array(String)](/sql-reference/data-types/array)) ‚Äî The statistics of the column.
- `estimates.min` ([Nullable(String)](/sql-reference/data-types/nullable)) ‚Äî Estimated minimum value of the column.
- `estimates.max` ([Nullable(String)](/sql-reference/data-types/nullable)) ‚Äî Estimated maximum value of the column.
- `estimates.cardinality` ([Nullable(UInt64)](/sql-reference/data-types/nullable)) ‚Äî Estimated cardinality of the column.
- `estimates.null_count` ([Nullable(UInt64)](/sql-reference/data-types/nullable)) ‚Äî Estimated number of NULL values in the column.
- `serialization_kind` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) ‚Äî Kind of serialization of a column
- `substreams` ([Array(String)](/sql-reference/data-types/array)) ‚Äî Names of substreams to which column is serialized
- `filenames` ([Array(String)](/sql-reference/data-types/array)) ‚Äî Names of files for each substream of a column respectively
- `subcolumns.names` ([Array(String)](/sql-reference/data-types/array)) ‚Äî Names of subcolumns of a column
- `subcolumns.types` ([Array(String)](/sql-reference/data-types/array)) ‚Äî Types of subcolumns of a column
- `subcolumns.serializations` ([Array(String)](/sql-reference/data-types/array)) ‚Äî Kinds of serialization of subcolumns of a column
- `subcolumns.bytes_on_disk` ([Array(UInt64)](/sql-reference/data-types/array)) ‚Äî Sizes in bytes for each subcolumn
- `subcolumns.data_compressed_bytes` ([Array(UInt64)](/sql-reference/data-types/array)) ‚Äî Sizes of the compressed data for each subcolumn, in bytes
- `subcolumns.data_uncompressed_bytes` ([Array(UInt64)](/sql-reference/data-types/array)) ‚Äî Sizes of the decompressed data for each subcolumn, in bytes
- `subcolumns.marks_bytes` ([Array(UInt64)](/sql-reference/data-types/array)) ‚Äî Sizes of the marks for each subcolumn of a column, in bytes

**Aliases:**

- `bytes` ‚Äî Alias for `bytes_on_disk`.
- `marks_size` ‚Äî Alias for `marks_bytes`.
- `part_name` ‚Äî Alias for `name`.
<!--AUTOGENERATED_END-->

## Example {#example}

```sql
SELECT * FROM system.parts_columns LIMIT 1 FORMAT Vertical;
```

```text
Row 1:
‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ
partition:                             tuple()
name:                                  all_1_2_1
part_type:                             Wide
active:                                1
marks:                                 2
rows:                                  2
bytes_on_disk:                         155
data_compressed_bytes:                 56
data_uncompressed_bytes:               4
marks_bytes:                           96
modification_time:                     2020-09-23 10:13:36
remove_time:                           2106-02-07 06:28:15
refcount:                              1
min_date:                              1970-01-01
max_date:                              1970-01-01
partition_id:                          all
min_block_number:                      1
max_block_number:                      2
level:                                 1
data_version:                          1
primary_key_bytes_in_memory:           2
primary_key_bytes_in_memory_allocated: 64
database:                              default
table:                                 53r93yleapyears
engine:                                MergeTree
disk_name:                             default
path:                                  /var/lib/clickhouse/data/default/53r93yleapyears/all_1_2_1/
column:                                id
type:                                  Int8
column_position:                       1
default_kind:
default_expression:
column_bytes_on_disk:                  76
column_data_compressed_bytes:          28
column_data_uncompressed_bytes:        2
column_marks_bytes:                    48
```
